title: helichrysopsis septentrionalis
intro: Helichrysopsis septentrionalis, also known as the northern rushrose or northern sunrose, is a shrub native to Australia. It is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Helichrysopsis septentrionalis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used in traditional herbal medicine to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
